test_description: This content should align LEFT in English and RIGHT in Arabic. Change the language to see the layout flip!

REGISTER.TITLE: Register New Subscriber

AUTH_WRAPPER.TITLE: Welcome to the Academy System
AUTH_WRAPPER.DESCRIPTION: From here you can register your subscription, follow training sessions, and manage all player matters easily. The steps are simple, and we will guide you step by step until registration is complete.

EASY_REGISTRATION.TITLE: Easy and Fast Registration
EASY_REGISTRATION.DESCRIPTION: Register yourself or your children in simple steps without complexity.

TRAINING_FOLLOWUP.TITLE: Training and Schedule Follow-up
TRAINING_FOLLOWUP.DESCRIPTION: Track training schedules and player attendance in an organized way.

SUBSCRIPTION_MANAGEMENT.TITLE: Easy Subscription Management
SUBSCRIPTION_MANAGEMENT.DESCRIPTION: Create, renew, and track subscriptions and payments from one place.

AUTH_VERIFICATION.SENT_CODE: The code has been sent to phone number {{phone}}

AUTH_CONFIRM_MAIL.TITLE: Thank you for joining {{projectName}}

AUTH_SUCCESS_REGISTER.TITLE: Your request has been registered successfully and is under review

WELCOME.TITLE: One Simple Step and We're Ready
WELCOME.DESCRIPTION_LINE1: Just one small step left to get started. Complete your
WELCOME.DESCRIPTION_LINE2: basic information to benefit from all academy

STEPS.STEP_1_DESC: Your basic data... Let's start with more about your academy, some simple information to help us store the academy more accurately.
STEPS.STEP_2_DESC: Activities, you can add more than one activity or add all activities.
STEPS.STEP_3_DESC: Packages, you can start with just one package and complete the rest later.
STEPS.STEP_4_DESC: If you have ready links, put them here. You don't have to add everything now, any link can be added or edited anytime later.
STEPS.STEP_5_DESC: Financial data, we're almost done, just one simple step left.
STEPS.STEP_6_DESC: Last step... and we're done, choosing mobile app colors, you can change colors anytime later, nothing is final now.

ACADEMY_POLICY.DEFAULT_POLICY_ALERT: You are currently using the default system policy. The content below is pre-filled from general settings. You can edit it to create your custom policy.
ACADEMY_POLICY.TIP_1: Be clear and specific about your terms.
ACADEMY_POLICY.TIP_2: Include specific timeframes for refunds and exchanges.
ACADEMY_POLICY.TIP_3: Keep language simple and understandable for all users.

BRANCH_SETTINGS.MANUAL_ATTENDANCE_DESC: Recorded manually by employee, guardian, or player

ERROR_CODES.Cannot use this product because it is no: Cannot use this product because it is not linked to a valid category in this branch.
